text: I feel a sense of curiosity and quiet anticipation as I stand outside the glass doors, glimpsing the colorful and modern display beyond. The environment feels clinical and organized, yet inviting. Moving into the space labeled R+D, I am struck by its intentional design and the invitation to reflect. The words displayed provoke thought about the nature of innovation and human connection. I feel inspired—both by the optimism of this place and by my own willingness to engage with new ideas.
